meta.title: About Us
meta.description: Architectural millwork built on trust. Driven by quality. Learn about Sandha Woodworks.

hero.title: Architectural millwork built on trust. Driven by quality.

journey.label: Our Journey
journey.title: Timeline
journey.description: From a small custom shop founded in {{founded}} to a certified architectural millwork manufacturer serving projects across North America.

2014.title: Sandha Woodworks is founded
2014.description: The principal brought years of hands-on carpentry and site experience into a small custom millwork shop rooted in craftsmanship and integrity.

2018.title: Expanded into full architectural millwork
2018.description: Expanded into full architectural millwork for commercial, institutional, and educational clients across Ontario.

2022.title: Industry memberships
2022.description: Became a member of AWMAC (Architectural Woodwork Manufacturers Association of Canada), CKCA (Canadian Kitchen Cabinet Association), and WMCO (Wood Manufacturing Cluster of Ontario).

2023.title: ISO 9001 certification
2023.description: Achieved ISO 9001 certification, formalizing our quality management system across engineering, production, and installation.

today.title: 40,000 sq. ft. facility
today.description: A 40,000 sq. ft. facility delivering engineered millwork for schools, universities, healthcare, retail, and commercial fit-outs across North America.

story.label: Our Story
story.title: A principal who came up through experience — and built a shop around it.
story.p1: Sandha Woodworks was founded in {{founded}} by Chamkaur Sandha, who came to architectural millwork the long way — through years of hands-on carpentry, site installation, and shop floor experience. That background shaped a very specific belief: great millwork is engineered by people who understand how it gets built, delivered, and installed.
story.p2: From a small custom shop, Sandha Woodworks has grown into a full-service architectural millwork manufacturer serving general contractors, architects, developers, and institutional clients across Canada and into the U.S. Our team, our processes, and our 40,000 sq. ft. facility are all built around one idea: deliver quality work, on time, without surprises.

certifications.title: Accredited by the industry bodies that set the standard.

leadership.label: Meet Our Leadership Team
leadership.title: The people behind every project.
leadership.description: Our leadership team brings together decades of experience in millwork, design, and project delivery — guiding Sandha Woodworks in delivering exceptional results for every client.

chamkaur-sandha.title: Founder – President
chamkaur-sandha.description: From humble beginnings, Chamkaur founded the company with a clear vision and a strong belief in the value of hard work. Through dedication, hands-on experience, and perseverance, he built the company step by step into a trusted and respected business rooted in integrity, craftsmanship, and quality.

gurpreet-singh.title: Project Manager
gurpreet-singh.description: Gurpreet completed his studies in Business Administration before gaining hands-on experience in the carpentry field. He supports project management through planning, coordination, and communication to ensure projects are delivered efficiently.

muhamed-mahmutovic.title: Director of Business Development
muhamed-mahmutovic.description: Muhamed brings over 10 years of experience in project and site management, with a strong background in project execution, contract management, and strategic growth. He focuses on identifying opportunities and supporting successful project delivery.

jayant-makkar.title: Project Engineer
jayant-makkar.description: Jayant specializes in architectural design and millwork engineering. With a background in architecture and kitchen and bath design, he translates complex concepts into efficient, buildable millwork solutions.

trevor-guyatt.title: Senior Estimator
trevor-guyatt.description: With over 17 years in the millwork industry — starting on the shop floor after graduating from Conestoga College — Trevor prepares accurate project estimates by carefully reviewing drawings, scope, and production requirements.

manjinder-singh.title: Production Manager
manjinder-singh.description: Manjinder oversees daily production operations to ensure projects are completed efficiently and on schedule. He manages workflow, scheduling, and team coordination while maintaining high standards of quality and craftsmanship.

jugraj-singh.title: Supply Chain
jugraj-singh.description: With hands-on experience in supply chain operations, Jugraj manages procurement and material coordination — working closely with vendors and internal teams to keep a reliable flow of materials and support smooth project execution.
